title: Silent Update Launcher Status
description: Status JSON written by plug_update_helper.exe and consumed by SilentUpdateCoordinator to reconcile the installer state across boot sessions. All fields are optional because the helper writes them progressively as the install advances.

installDirectory.description: Resolved install directory passed to the installer.

installerPath.description: Absolute path to the downloaded installer (.exe).

logPath.description: Absolute path to the Inno Setup log captured during the install.

nonAdminExitCode.description: Exit code from the non-admin install attempt (currentUser strategy).

elevatedExitCode.description: Exit code from the elevated retry, when triggered.

appPid.description: Process ID the helper was asked to wait on before installing.

signatureStatus.description: Authenticode validation outcome on the downloaded installer (helper-side).

actualSha256.description: SHA-256 of the downloaded installer as computed by the helper.

elevatedCancelled.description: True when the user cancelled the UAC prompt before the elevated install ran.

errorMessage.description: Human-readable error reason, when the install failed.

lastUpdatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last status write.
